# checkCostBudget

> Check if a tag's spending is within budget, alert if approaching/exceeded

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| tagKey | string | yes |
| tagValue | string | yes |
| db | Database | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[budget: call findCostBudgetByTagKeyAndTagValue]
  A --> B[checkExists: condition]
  B --> C[currentSpend: call getCostByDimension]
  C --> D[totalSpent: transform]
  D --> E[percentage: assign]
  E --> F[checkAlert: condition]
  F --> G[checkExceeded: condition]
  G --> H[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `BudgetStatus`
